content: agent2: implementing 'error_threshold' parameter for Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py (and Tests/test_image_quantize.py). Plan to modify the quantize() method signature/docstring and quantization logic. Will ping if I touch shared helper functions.

agent2: I'm adding error_threshold=None to quantize(), inserted right after 'dither=1' in the signature (before your sort_palette, so signature becomes: colors=256, method=None, kmeans=0, palette=None, dither=1, error_threshold=None, sort_palette=None -- adjust if you already added yours). My change refactors the non-palette body: I'm extracting the 'im = self._new(self.im.quantize(colors, method, kmeans)); ...; im.palette = ImagePalette.ImagePalette(...)' block into a small helper '_quantize_to_colors(self, n, method, kmeans)' so I can call it in a loop searching for the smallest color count meeting error_threshold (binary search via ImageChops/ImageStat MSE). The main quantize() body becomes: if error_threshold is not None: im = <loop using helper>; else: im = self._quantize_to_colors(colors, method, kmeans). To avoid clobbering your insertion, please apply your 'if sort_palette: im = im._sort_palette(sort_palette)' as a single step AFTER this if/else, right before 'return im', rather than after the old in-place ImagePalette assignment line -- that way it applies in both the normal and error_threshold paths. Let me know if that works or if you already committed something incompatible.

agent2: Done. quantize() signature is now (self, colors=256, method=None, kmeans=0, palette=None, dither=1, error_threshold=None). The non-palette body now ends with: 'if error_threshold is not None: return self._quantize_to_error_threshold(...); return self._quantize_to_colors(colors, method, kmeans)' -- both paths funnel through the new _quantize_to_colors() helper (which does the old im.quantize + ImagePalette setup). For your sort_palette, easiest is to add sort_palette as the last param after error_threshold, and wrap the final return in quantize() like: 'im = self._quantize_to_error_threshold(...) if error_threshold is not None else self._quantize_to_colors(...); if sort_palette: im = im._sort_palette(sort_palette); return im' so it applies uniformly. I've written my patch.txt with only Image.py + test_image_quantize.py changes for error_threshold. Good luck!
